sentences.english: My favorite singer is a K-pop idol.
I listen to her songs every day on my way to school.
sentences.korean: 매일 학교 가는 길에 그녀의 노래를 들어요.

sentences.english: She has a beautiful voice and dances very well.
sentences.korean: 아름다운 목소리를 가지고 있고 춤도 매우 잘 춰요.

sentences.english: I went to her concert last year and it was the best night of my life.
sentences.korean: 작년에 콘서트에 갔는데 인생 최고의 밤이었어요.

sentences.english: I hope I can see her perform again soon.
sentences.korean: 곧 다시 공연을 볼 수 있기를 바라요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
